hero.label: Made for Reprompt
hero.headline: I want to help Reprompt win the maps data race.
hero.subheadline: Reprompt is solving a real infrastructure problem for location products by turning live POI updates into something mapping companies can trust at scale. I am excited by the chance to join as a Founding SDR and help build the outbound engine for a YC startup already serving companies like Radar and TomTom.

whyCompany.title: Reprompt fixes a critical maps data problem
whyCompany.body: Keeping point of interest data fresh is hard, expensive, and constantly changing. Reprompt’s Scout platform stands out because it helps location companies get live business information that keeps maps accurate and useful.

whyCompany.title: Early sales hires can shape the whole go to market
whyCompany.body: With Reprompt still small and recently founded, this role is more than just booking meetings. It is a chance to help define messaging, learn the market fast, and build repeatable pipeline alongside the founders at an important stage.

whyCompany.title: I have already done SDR work in AI and B2B
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I handled cold outreach, HubSpot workflows, and LinkedIn sequencing to help bring in 15 to 20 paying clients. At NextAfter, I built on that foundation in a B2B consulting environment, which sharpened how I research accounts, personalize messaging, and connect product value to buyer pain.

quote: I want this role because Reprompt is selling something technical, useful, and easy to care about once you understand the problem. I would love to be the person opening those conversations and helping turn an early advantage into real revenue.
